steps.title: Problem Statement Incomplete
steps.content:
The equation $5x^m = 7x$ cannot hold for all $x > 1$ (or any specific $x$) without additional context. A unique value of $m$ requires either:
  • A specific value of $x$;
  • Additional constraints or a diagram providing context;
  • Clarification that this describes a different relationship (ratio, proportion, or conditional equality).
Please verify the complete problem statement, including any figures or prior context. Without this, the algebraic form $5x^m = 7x$ has no solution for $m$.
